job_description:
• Troubleshooting: Serve as the final line of defense for technical demo issues, ensuring a seamless experience for our account executives and prospects.
• Platform Evangelism: Stay ahead of the curve on new Salesforce releases (three times a year) to incorporate the latest features into our demo toolkit.
• Life at Salesforce Our Locations Our Locations North America Europe, Middle East, and Africa Asia Pacific Latin America Our Teams Our Teams Sales Technology & Product Customer Success Corporate Roles AI Research University University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager Talent Programs Talent Programs Overview Future Pathways India Return to Work Military Fellows Our Story Newsroom Blog Careers Trust Salesforce.
• Org Sustainability Investors Give us your Feedback Sitemap Legal Terms of Service Privacy Information Responsible Disclosure Trust Contact Manage Preferences Advanced Salesforce Development: 2+ years of hands-on experience with Apex, LWC, and Salesforce Flows.
• The "Pre-Sales Mindset": You understand that a demo needs to be flashy and fast, not just functional.
• Experience in Pre-Sales: Prior experience as a Sales Engineer or Demo Engineer is a significant plus.
• University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager.
• Asset Development: Architect and build reusable Lightning Web Components (LWC), complex Apex triggers/classes, and sophisticated Flows to enhance our demo environments.
